title: Infrastructure version check?
excerpt:
Is there a simple way to find out if an account is on the new infrastructure?  Like a query/response that would indicate old vs. new? 
I’ve seen to look in BB (Big Brain) but I don’t know how to access and probably don’t…

posts.author: DrewBeFree (Drew Webb)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a simple way to find out if an account is on the new infrastructure? Like a query/response that would indicate old vs. new?

I’ve seen to look in BB (Big Brain) but I don’t know how to access and probably don’t have permissions to do so. Somone please advise!

Thank you,

-Drew

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @DrewBeFree,

You can not access Bigbrain since it is used internally.

There is no query to get such information.

What would the use case be here?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: DrewBeFree (Drew Webb)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Matias.Monday - Thank you for your response. I was wondering because some new features require a certain infrastructure version, i.e., Portfolio Management from what I understand and it would be nice to know if requesting a feature is a waste of energy or not.

Thanks again!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Happy to help @DrewBeFree !

You can bring any requests you can think of to us

Worst case scenario is us telling you it can not be done, but we are all ears!
